description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Main CI that runs on push to main and fix/* branches. Use a multi-job workflow with separate jobs for Linux, macOS, and Windows. For each job, use a matrix strategy to test different build configurations and compilers. For Linux, use a container with a GCC or Clang image and test Debug and Release builds. For macOS, test with Xcode 14 and 15 and Debug and Release builds. For Windows, test with Visual Studio 2019 and different toolsets and build types.
